notes.latency: Measured on 100 search queries using cosine similarity via pgvector ivfflat index on local PostgreSQL
notes.reduction: Tagging reduction equals precision: fraction of tags requiring no human correction. Before LLM, humans tag 100% manually. After LLM, humans only correct the 6.6% the model got wrong — a 93.4% reduction in per-field effort. The 42% figure represents reduction in full product tagging sessions needed (where a session is flagged only if at least one field needs correction).
